title: clinopodium confine
intro: Clinopodium confine, also known as Clinopodium vulgare or Wild Basil, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium confine include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Clinopodium confine can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its benefits.
